items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce
items.summary: This update resolves critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities, including arbitrary code execution, security feature bypass, and privilege escalation.

items.title: Improper encoding or escaping of output vulnerability in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: An unauthenticated, zero-interaction flaw in the webhooks component that can lead to arbitrary code execution.

items.title: File upload vulnerability in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: A file upload vulnerability that could lead to privilege escalation by allowing attackers to upload unrestricted files to the server.

items.title: Amasty patches 25 Magento extensions, 1 critical
items.summary: Amasty issued a massive security release for 25 extensions, with one critical vulnerability that can lead to remote code execution.

items.title: Unauthenticated file upload in Amasty Order Attributes for Magento
items.summary: An unauthenticated arbitrary file upload flaw allows attackers to write executable files to a Magento store without logging in, opening the door to remote code execution.

items.title: Unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer
items.summary: A critical unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer allows remote code execution via a crafted CacheWarmer cookie.

items.title: PolyShell: unrestricted file upload in Magento and Adobe Commerce
items.summary: A critical flaw in Magento's REST API that allows unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files to any store using a polyglot technique to bypass validation.

items.title: Critical Security Update: Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This critical security update addresses multiple vulnerabilities that could allow attackers to bypass security mechanisms, gain escalated privileges, and execute unauthorized malicious code.
